query:
UPDATE games SET publishedModel=1 WHERE sport='NCAAM' AND gameDate='2026-03-19' AND modelTotal IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN publishedModel=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pub, SUM(CASE WHEN publishedModel=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending FROM games WHERE sport='NCAAM' AND gameDate='2026-03-19';
command:
